bronze-upgrade-validation.normal: Open one configured bronze source pack, submit Bronze Upgrade, and open the silver reward.
bronze-upgrade-validation.recovery: Stop without submission when the source pack or SBC challenge is unavailable.

daily-bronze.normal: Consume bronze duplicates before opening another Bronze Players Premium reward pack.
daily-bronze.recovery: Resume existing Unassigned bronze duplicates and stop safely when the daily SBC is complete.

daily-bronze-mvp.normal: Run at most one Daily Bronze completion with the normal recycle rules.
daily-bronze-mvp.recovery: Do not open another pack after the single completion or when no challenge remains.

daily-silver.normal: Consume silver duplicates before opening another Silver Players Premium reward pack.
daily-silver.recovery: Resume existing Unassigned silver duplicates and stop safely when the daily SBC is complete.

daily-silver-mvp.normal: Run at most one Daily Silver completion with the normal recycle rules.
daily-silver-mvp.recovery: Do not open another pack after the single completion or when no challenge remains.

daily-common.normal: Submit exactly five silver and five bronze players using Unassigned, Storage, Transfer, then Club fallback.
daily-common.recovery: Open at most one relevant shortage pack at a time and stop opening packs when Unassigned cannot be routed safely.

daily-common-mvp.normal: Run at most one five-silver/five-bronze completion.
daily-common-mvp.recovery: Preserve usable Unassigned materials and stop safely on capacity or material shortage.

daily-rare.normal: Use common gold from Unassigned, Storage, Transfer, then an 11x Gold Players Pack before Club fallback.
daily-rare.recovery: Resume common gold duplicates and stop when no pack or safe Club fallback can complete the challenge.

daily-rare-mvp.normal: Run at most one Daily Rare completion while preserving the common-gold ratio.
daily-rare-mvp.recovery: Stop safely when the challenge or source pack is unavailable.

daily-rare-pack-84.normal: Standalone mode opens all matching Daily rare gold packs, counts duplicate-driven 2x84+ submissions toward rounds, then fills the remaining target from inventory; One-click mode limits the final inventory fallback to one completion.
daily-rare-pack-84.recovery: Resume response-only duplicates even when the Unassigned UI cache is delayed, protect 82+ cards, and let the current Open reward packs option control every 2x84+ reward.

one-click-daily-mvp.normal: Run one completion for each configured MVP Daily stage.
one-click-daily-mvp.recovery: Skip completed stages and continue from the first remaining or recoverable stage.

one-click-daily.normal: Run Daily Bronze, Silver, Common, Rare, then consume all matching Rare Packs before allowing one inventory 2x84+ fallback.
one-click-daily.recovery: Restart from existing Unassigned state, skip completed stages, and continue after a prior safe stop without unbounded inventory fallback.

inventory-fodder-exhaustion.normal: Submit Bronze Upgrade and force-open its Silver rewards to feed the next stage, then do the same for Silver Upgrade and Common Gold rewards, then exhaust 5x 80+ Upgrade with nine safe common gold cards rated <=81; matching 5x 80+ rewards open at the end only when Open reward packs is enabled.
inventory-fodder-exhaustion.recovery: Stop if a required Bronze/Silver reward cannot be opened or if selection/submission is unsafe; blocked or stopped runs do not enter the deferred 5x 80+ reward-opening phase.

2x84-fodder.normal: Submit six low rare gold players and let the current Open reward packs option decide whether to open the reward.
2x84-fodder.recovery: Stop before submission when fewer than six safe low rare gold players are available.

auto-totw-upgrade.normal: Build the lowest safe dynamic-rating squad and open the resulting TOTW reward pack.
auto-totw-upgrade.recovery: Stop on unsupported dynamic requirements, rating shortage, or reward-pack failure.

84x10-mvp.normal: Submit one lowest safe dynamic-rating squad with exactly one eligible TOTW, TOTS, or FOF card.
84x10-mvp.recovery: Use configured TOTW and 2x84+ prerequisites, then stop if a safe squad still cannot be built.

84x10.normal: Repeat the shared rating workflow until the SBC is unavailable, bounded only by the configured safety cap while preserving reward packs by default.
84x10.recovery: Resume after prerequisite crafting and stop without submission when dynamic validation fails.

provision-crafting.normal: Route Common Gold through the configured 4 of 10 83+ Player Pick and then 5x 80+ Upgrade; route Rare Gold through 2x 84+ Upgrade at every pre-open, pack, and final cleanup point.
provision-crafting.recovery: Resume pending Pick or reserved duplicates without generic recovery consumption; preserve incomplete materials and continue on a later Provision round.

fof-glory-hunters-exhaustion.normal: Repeat 5x 80+ Upgrade with nine safe common gold cards rated <=81 until fewer than one complete squad remains; when Open reward packs is enabled, open all matching 5x 80+ rewards together after the stage.
fof-glory-hunters-exhaustion.recovery: Stop on unsafe selection or submission failure without entering the deferred reward-opening phase; otherwise use the shared pack transaction for the final batch.
